description_long: This sculpture features a bronze or dark metal bust of a man, depicted from the chest up, mounted atop a tall, rectangular pedestal. The bust is detailed, showing the subject's facial features, hair, and upper torso, with a textured surface that suggests a lifelike representation. The pedestal is made of a rust-colored or weathered metal, with some visible discoloration and patina, and stands on a roughly square stone or concrete base. The entire sculpture is set on a patch of grass and dirt, indicating an outdoor installation. The back of the bust is less detailed, focusing on the hair and shoulders, while the front displays the most intricate sculpting. The overall impression is of a commemorative or memorial statue, likely honoring a notable individual.
description: A bronze bust of a man on a tall, weathered metal pedestal, set outdoors on a grassy patch. The sculpture is detailed in the front and mounted on a stone base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the bust and the tall, rust-colored pedestal, with the grassy base visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the bust, the rectangular pedestal, and the uneven grassy ground.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, showing the other side of the bust and pedestal, with more visible discoloration on the pedestal.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the detailed face and chest of the bust, the full height of the pedestal, and the stone base.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a patch of grass and dirt, suggesting a park or open public space.
